title: wolfhsm tests: core (tests 1-7)
description: Write wolfhsm/tests/integration.rs infrastructure and core tests. server_addr() fn returns WOLFHSM_SERVER env var; skip test body if None. Tests: connect_disconnect (Client::connect then drop), echo (byte-exact), nvm_write_read (byte-exact), nvm_overwrite (second value wins), nvm_not_found (Error::NotFound), nvm_label_too_long (Error::LabelTooLong no round-trip), counter_lifecycle (init/increment/read/destroy). Simulator: cd ~/GIT/wolfHSM && make wh_server_sim && ./wh_server_sim & export WOLFHSM_SERVER=127.0.0.1:8080.
